popularStory.headline: Brief Overview of Lady Marjory Stewart's Life
popularStory.description:
From http://www.thepeerage.com/p10802.htm
F, #108012, d. before August 1432
Last Edited=7 Oct 2012
Lady Marjorie Stewart was born before 1380. She was the daughter of Robert Stewart, 1st Duke of Alban …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Marjorie Marceline Stewart於1375年4月7日出生在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾格勒諾爾時，她的父親Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany35歲，母親Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith41歲。她於大約1400年與Sir Duncan Campbell 1st Lord of Lochow在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1421年在蘇格蘭阿吉爾吉爾蒙享年46歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特吉爾蒙吉爾蒙 帕里什 邱奇 安德 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marjorie Marceline Stewart于1375年4月7日出生在英国苏格兰阿吉爾格勒諾爾时，她的父亲Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany35岁，母亲Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith41岁。她于大约1400年与Sir Duncan Campbell 1st Lord of Lochow在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1421年在苏格兰阿吉爾吉爾蒙享年46岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特吉爾蒙吉爾蒙 帕里什 邱奇 安德 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Marjorie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

variants.name: Marjory
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

nameMeanings.name: Marceline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Marjorie Marceline Stewart was born on 7 April 1375, in Glenorchy, Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany, was 35 and her mother, Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith, was 41. She married Sir Duncan Campbell 1st Lord of Lochow about 1400, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1421, in Kilmun, Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 46, and was buried in Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmun, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marjorie Marceline Stewart est née le 7 avril 1375, à Glenorchy, Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Duncan Campbell 1st Lord of Lochow environ 1400, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1421, à Kilmun, Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmun, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

April 1375 in Glenorchy, Argyll, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany 35 und ihre Mutter Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith 41. Sie hat um 1400 in Scotland Sir Duncan Campbell 1st Lord of Lochow geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1421 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Kilmun, Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmun, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Marjorie Marceline Stewartが1375年4月7日にイギリススコットランドアルグイルグレノーチイで生まれた時，父Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albanyは35歳，母Margaret Graham Countess of Menteithは41歳であった。約1400年にスコットランドでSir Duncan Campbell 1st Lord of Lochowと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1421年にスコットランドアルグイルキルムンで46歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトキルムンキルムン パーイッシュ チャーチ アンド セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marjorie Marceline Stewart(이)가 1375년 4월 7일 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 글렌르c히에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 대략 1400년 스컷랜드에서 Sir Duncan Campbell 1st Lord of Lochow(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1421년 스컷랜드 아그이 킬먼에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 킬먼 킬먼 파리시 처르치 앤드 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marjorie Marceline Stewart nasceu em 7 de abril de 1375, em Glenorchy, Argyll, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Duncan Campbell 1st Lord of Lochow aproximadamente 1400, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1421, em Kilmun, Argyll, Scotland, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmun, Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Kilmun Parish Church and Cemetery Kilmun: килмун пэриш чурч анд кеметири, килмун, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marjorie Marceline Stewart родилась 7 апреля 1375 г. в местности гленорчи, аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Duncan Campbell 1st Lord of Lochow около 1400 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1421 г. в местности килмун, аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности килмун пэриш чурч анд кеметири, килмун, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marjorie Marceline Stewart nació el 7 de abril de 1375, en Glenorchy, Argyll, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Sir Duncan Campbell 1st Lord of Lochow aproximadamente 1400, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1421, en Kilmun, Argyll, Scotland, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmun, Argyll and Bute, Escocia, Reino Unido.
